See URL for changelog. Builds fine on 11.4 i386, 12.1 amd64, 12.2 i386, 13.0 amd64. I don't have required hardware to test runtime.

multimedia/arcan needs this update (NV12 support), see https://github.com/letoram/arcan/commit/66efdebb236c
